TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Dave Bing == Dave Bing sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1943, byacing te 11 ru 24 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Washington, D.C., hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 82 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1966 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Detroit Pistons. gocyu ru hopa pqwasan biru 1959 kawas,gocyu samon mzyu mari. maki amirika ga galang nha lokah na squliq. pincyuwagan nya' kawas tay 1976 ga wal galan musaq' mspung sa gluw na MVP. ryax qnxan nqu Dave Bingsa senmung pgnawgan mari'. min 3.8 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'. min 6 qu rnaw nya' magal tensu'. pzyang balay maki' yunaw na pgnaw' mari'. (1976) thawki' balay na p'agal tins' NBA. (1968) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Basketball Hall of Fame OrangeHoops.Org profile on Bing Dave Bing
S.PHON: == *a*e βiŋ == *a*e βiŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa was~ɕħiŋton, *.ʦ~ʨ., ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu *etroit pis~ɕtons~ɕ. ɣoʦ~ʨju ru ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru **** kawas~ɕ,ɣoʦ~ʨju s~ɕamon mzju mari. maki amirika ɣa ɣalaŋ nħa lokaħ na s~ɕquliq. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣa wal ɣalan mus~ɕaqʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa ɣluw na m*p. rjax qnxan nqu *a*e βiŋs~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. min *.* zniŋat njaʔ mariʔzik na ttkran mariʔ. min * qu rnaw njaʔ maɣal tens~ɕuʔ. pzjaŋ βalaj makiʔ junaw na pɣnawʔ mariʔ. (****) tħawkiʔ βalaj na pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ nβa. (****) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βas~ɕketβall ħall o* *ame oraŋeħoops~ɕ.orɣ pro*ile on βiŋ *a*e βiŋ
S.FORM: == Dave Bing == Dave Bing sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1943, byacing te 11 ru 24 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Washington, D.C., hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 82 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1966 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Detroit Pistons. gocyu ru hopa pqwasan biru 1959 kawas,gocyu samon mzyu mari. maki amirika ga galang nha lokah na squliq. pincyuwagan nya' kawas tay 1976 ga wal galan musaq' mspung sa gluw na MVP. ryax qnxan nqu Dave Bingsa senmung pgnawgan mari'. min 3.8 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'. min 6 qu rnaw nya' magal tensu'. pzyang balay maki' yunaw na pgnaw' mari'. (1976) thawki' balay na p'agal tins' NBA. (1968) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Basketball Hall of Fame OrangeHoops.Org profile on Bing Dave Bing
S.PHON: == *a*e βiŋ == *a*e βiŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa was~ɕħiŋton, *.ʦ~ʨ., ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu *etroit pis~ɕtons~ɕ. ɣoʦ~ʨju ru ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru **** kawas~ɕ,ɣoʦ~ʨju s~ɕamon mzju mari. maki amirika ɣa ɣalaŋ nħa lokaħ na s~ɕquliq. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣa wal ɣalan mus~ɕaqʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa ɣluw na m*p. rjax qnxan nqu *a*e βiŋs~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. min *.* zniŋat njaʔ mariʔzik na ttkran mariʔ. min * qu rnaw njaʔ maɣal tens~ɕuʔ. pzjaŋ βalaj makiʔ junaw na pɣnawʔ mariʔ. (****) tħawkiʔ βalaj na pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ nβa. (****) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βas~ɕketβall ħall o* *ame oraŋeħoops~ɕ.orɣ pro*ile on βiŋ *a*e βiŋ
